DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO ATTEND AND TESTIFY AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION ON A DATE TO BE AGREED UPON BY COUNSEL AND ON A DATE NO LATER THAN 20 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HIS DEPOSITION WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $711.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
